title: Hut 8's Extreme Valuation Trap: Why the Earnings Beat Masks a Dangerous Revenue Miss
text: HUT Valuation Analysis and Earnings Miss. Critical analysis of Hut 8's valuation despite mixed earnings results. EPS beat masks significant revenue miss in recent quarters. Company trading at premium valuation despite unprofitability. P/S ratio of 43.1x vs industry average 3.7x raises red flags. Analyst concerns about whether valuation justified by contracted growth. Highlights disconnect between market enthusiasm and fundamental profitability.
